Electricity quiz

What is the unit of electric current?

  • Volt
  • Ampere
  • Ohm
  • Watt

In a series circuit, what happens to the current when you add another bulb?

  • It increases
  • It decreases
  • It stays the same
  • It doubles
What component is used to measure voltage in a circuit?
A voltmeter is connected in parallel with the component being measured.
Which type of circuit has all components connected in a single loop?
Series circuit Parallel circuit Open circuit
  • What is the relationship between voltage, current, and resistance in Ohm's Law?
  • Describe how a fuse protects an electrical circuit.

This is regular page content about electricity that is not a question.

Electricity flows through conductors like copper wire.
